roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:PAROLEE ADMITS A VIOLATION TO #2 - POSSESSIONOFDRUG PARAPHERNALIA,/3000REIN/PAJ:64 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDITFOR  21  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 12-10-13 /X:PAROLEE MUSTCOMPLETE 63 DAYS OF TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED BYTHE SHERIFF ON 01-07-14, ADULT PAROLE CAN MODIFY OR CHANGETREATMENT, SENDPAROLEE TO DETOX OR ANY OTHER MEASURE DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE 63 DAYS,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPONRELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
